chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1415 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6369/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel states that this petition has impugned notice which in his opinion is unwarranted in view of Judgment of Division Bench, reported as 2021 PTD 1955. Counsel further states that notice shall be responded to before the issuing authority. It is further sought that pending such adjudication, no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
